intro: Artemisia absinthium, also known as absinthe wormwood, is a medicinal herb that has been traditionally used to make a bitter infusion, often used to aid in digestion and relieve stomach issues. The infusion is typically made by steeping the leaves and stems of the plant in hot water, and it is often consumed in small amounts to avoid overwhelming the senses. When consumed responsibly, artemisia absinthium infusion can provide a range of health benefits, including reduced inflammation and improved immune function.
